description: Rise of Avalon Patch 2 Hotfix 2 (28 August 2020) — Corrupted Dungeon matchmaking defender/invader designation fix.

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Resolved an issue where players newer to Corrupted Dungeons were more likely to be designated as defenders than invaders when registering for PvP
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Corrupted Dungeons defenders invaders matchmaking PvP newer players
